context: Tests whether the agent uses insert-placeholder-slides.py to insert visually loud placeholder slides at specified positions in an existing deck, preserving original slide order and producing the correct final slide count.

checklist.name: Output deck exists and opens
checklist.description: adapted-deck.pptx exists in the working directory and can be opened with python-pptx without errors

checklist.name: Correct total slide count
checklist.description: The output deck has exactly 9 slides (6 original + 3 placeholders)

checklist.name: Placeholder at position 3
checklist.description: Slide 3 (0-indexed: 2) contains text with '[PLACEHOLDER]' and 'Cloud Cost Analysis'. It is between the original Introduction and Problem Statement slides

checklist.name: Placeholder at position 5
checklist.description: Slide 5 (0-indexed: 4) contains text with '[PLACEHOLDER]' and 'Migration Strategy'. It is between the original Current Architecture and Performance Results slides (accounting for earlier insertions)

checklist.name: Placeholder at position 8
checklist.description: Slide 8 (0-indexed: 7) contains text with '[PLACEHOLDER]' and 'Q&A Prep'. It is near the end of the deck, after the original Performance Results slide

checklist.name: Yellow background on placeholders
checklist.description: The placeholder slides have a visually distinct background — a yellow or bright-colored rectangle shape that makes them stand out in thumbnail view. Not the same as the original slides' appearance

checklist.name: Original slides preserved in order
checklist.description: The 6 original slides (Title, Introduction, Problem Statement, Current Architecture, Performance Results, Conclusion) are all present and in their original relative order, interleaved with the new placeholders

checklist.name: Skill script used
checklist.description: The adaptation-log.md references insert-placeholder-slides.py as the tool used. The agent did not write its own slide insertion code from scratch using raw python-pptx calls

checklist.name: Subtitles present on placeholders
checklist.description: The placeholder slides include subtitle text describing what the slide needs to become (e.g., 'AWS vs GCP pricing comparison', 'Step-by-step migration path', 'Anticipated questions')

checklist.name: Non-destructive output
checklist.description: The output deck is saved as adapted-deck.pptx (not overwriting the original input base-deck.pptx). The --output flag or a copy was used to preserve the original
